name: Nearly Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the semisweet chocolate and butter over low heat or in the microwave until smooth.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. In another bowl, beat eggs, sugar, and vanilla at high speed until well combined.
5. Slowly beat in the cooled melted chocolate mixture, then add the dry ingredients until just blended but smooth.
6. Stir in the chocolate morsels and chopped pecans.
7. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes. Do not over bake.
9. Cool on a wire rack. Cookies may be made ahead of time or frozen.
